_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# ros_system_fingerprint
+A simple tool for getting information about a system to share

data.author: pre-commit-ci[bot]
data.message:
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate

updates:
- [github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks: v4.2.0 → v4.3.0](https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks/compare/v4.2.0...v4.3.0)
- [github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-autopep8: v1.6.0 → v1.7.0](https://github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-autopep8/compare/v1.6.0...v1.7.0)
- [github.com/PyCQA/flake8: 4.0.1 → 5.0.4](https://github.com/PyCQA/flake8/compare/4.0.1...5.0.4)
- [github.com/codespell-project/codespell: v2.1.0 → v2.2.1](https://github.com/codespell-project/codespell/compare/v2.1.0...v2.2.1)

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 repos:
 - repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks
-  rev: v4.2.0
+  rev: v4.3.0
   hooks:
   - id: check-added-large-files
   - id: check-case-conflict
@@ -17,15 +17,15 @@ repos:
   - id: double-quote-string-fixer
   - id: requirements-txt-fixer
 - repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-autopep8
-  rev: v1.6.0
+  rev: v1.7.0
   hooks:
   - id: autopep8
 - repo: https://github.com/PyCQA/flake8
-  rev: 4.0.1
+  rev: 5.0.4
   hooks:
   - id: flake8
 - repo: https://github.com/codespell-project/codespell
-  rev: v2.1.0
+  rev: v2.2.1
   hooks:
   - id: codespell
     args: ['--write-changes']
